hypothesis: If a multi-stage AI-guided pipeline combining database mining, machine learning interatomic potential relaxation, and conditional generative modeling is applied to Li–Si–X chemical space, then it will identify novel silicon-based anode materials with theoretical gravimetric capacities exceeding 1500 mAh/g and structurally stable lithium-ion migration channels (large, geometry-preserving Rt) across charge–discharge states, because integrating geometric channel analysis with generative design conditioned on electrochemical and structural descriptors will efficiently navigate the vast compositional space to discover candidates that simultaneously satisfy high capacity and favorable ionic transport requirements.
